examples: the plane crashed in the vicinity of Asheville
he always blames someone else in the immediate neighborhood
I will drop in on you the next time I am in this neck of the woods

meanings.definition: the approximate amount of something (usually used prepositionally as in `in the region of')
examples: it was going to take in the region of two or three months to finish the job
the price is in the neighborhood of $100

meanings.definition: an area within a city or town that has some distinctive features (especially one forming a community)
